title: NEBNext® Ultra™ II End Repair/dA-Tailing Module (NEB #E7546)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4dgss","text":"The NEBNext Ultra II End Repair/dA-Tailing Module is optimized to convert 500 pg-1 μg of fragmented DNA to repaired DNA having 5 ́ phosphorylated, 3 ́ dA-tailed ends. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d8r62","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7j58c","text":"This module is part of the Ultra™ II workflow, and is optimized for use with the NEBNext™ Ultra II Ligation Module (NEB #E7595), for Illumina®-compatible library construction. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dnatf","text":"\nThis module is also compatible with some Oxford Nanopore MinION™workflows.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"50ssq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fiqil","text":"This module is designed for use with NEBNext Singleplex or Multiplex Oligos for Illumina (NEB #E7350, #E7335, #E7500, #E7600 or #E7535), NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Module (NEB #E7595), and NEBNext Ultra II Q5 Master Mix (NEB #M0544). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aq6a8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f5jp4","text":"Kits that include reagents for every step in the Ultra II DNA library construction workflow are also available (NEBNext Ultra II DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina (NEB #E7645) and NEBNext Ultra II DNA Library Prep with Sample Purification Beads (NEB #E7103).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":168,"length":6},{"key":1,"offset":249,"length":7}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"D2369CF8FCC743CAAE25C29FEB498A35","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7645-nebnext-ultra-ii-dna-library-prep-kit-for-illumina"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"A532155AC291454487BB7161828A6973","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7103-nebnext-ultra-ii-dna-library-prep-with-sample-purification-beads"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8m135","text":"Safe Stop Point: This is a point where you can safely stop the protocol and store the samples prior to proceeding to the next step in the protocol. \n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ctd97","text":"Caution: Signifies a step in the protocol that has two paths leading to the same point. \n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fdjrl","text":"Color: A color listed before or after a reagent name indicates the cap color of the reagent to be added.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9mbda","text":"Starting Material: 500 pg–1 μg fragmented DNA. We recommend that DNA be sheared in 1X TE. If the DNA volume post shearing is less than 50 μl, add 1X TE to a final volume of 50 μl. Alternatively, 10 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.0 or 0.1X TE can be used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"DHWIT","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"q76XA","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"Vqo9U","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":119215,"guid":"4198021D341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"NEBNext Ultra II End Prep Reaction Buffer","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E7647","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7645-nebnext-ultra-ii-dna-library-prep-kit-for-illumina#Product%20Information","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":125193,"guid":"419EFF47341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"NEBNext Ultra II End Prep Enzyme Mix","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E7646","url":"https://www.neb.com/products/e7645-nebnext-ultra-ii-dna-library-prep-kit-for-illumina#Product%20Information","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Mix the following contents in a sterile nuclease-free tube: %s %s

Set a 100 μl or 200 μl pipette to 50 μl and then gently pipette the entire volume up and down at least 10 times to mix thoroughly. Perform a quick spin to collect all liquid from the sides of the tube. Note: It is important to mix well. The presence of a small amount of bubbles will not interfere with performance.

Place in a thermocycler, with the heated lid set to ≥ 75°C, and run the following program: 00:30:00 at 20 °C 00:30:00 at 65 °C Hold at 4 °C Safe Stop Point: If necessary, samples can be stored at –20°C; however, a slight loss in yield (~20%) may be observed. We recommend continuing with adaptor ligation before stopping.
Proceed directly to NEBNext Ultra II Ligation Module NEB #E7595.
creator: Isabel Gautreau
